Title: Reduces electric corporations' response time for securing downed wires
Summary: Requires each utility to take appropriate safety precautions regarding electrical hazards, including developing plans to promptly de-energize downed wires within two hours of notification of the location of such downed wires from a municipal emergency responder and promptly secure such wires within six hours in the case of events that are not considered emergencies.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the public service law, in relation to reducing the response time for securing downed wires
